title: agropyron junceum var. repens
intro: Agropyron junceum var. repens, also known as creeping wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of creeping wheat grass include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as acting as an antibacterial agent. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, juice, and powder, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
